title: Architect Agent Code Review + Self-Healing Pipeline
description: Add review stage (architect agent), fix stage (targeted fixes), and verify loop for self-healing pipeline
complexity_reasoning: Requires modifications to state machine, stage definitions, handlers, and parsing logic across multiple files
assumptions: Architect agent can be reused with modified instructions
State machine loop logic is extensible
Existing commit post-action can be reused
review_questions: Is the verify loop logic sound?
Should fix stage allow unlimited retries or cap at 2?
Should review stage be optional for simple tasks?
